mapper.insert: insert into sys_user (username, password, nickname, phone, email, avatar, status, deleted, role, last_login_time, create_time, update_time) values (#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{avatar}, #{status}, #{deleted}, #{role}, #{lastLoginTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: update sys_user set last_login_time = #{lastLoginTime}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select * from sys_user where username = #{username} and deleted = 0 limit 1
select * from sys_user where phone = #{phone} and deleted = 0 limit 1
select * from sys_user where email = #{email} and deleted = 0 limit 1

select * from sys_user
deleted = 0
and (username like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or nickname like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or phone like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or email like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
order by id desc
